archetype.canonical_meaning: Person cries tears of joy — face looks like grief but they're actually ecstatic.
archetype.name: tears_of_joy

context_text: One person only in the frame. Single subject composition. A 25-year-old woman alone in a small home office, an open acceptance letter on the desk, lips moving as they speak. Throughout: tears flowing freely down both cheeks and dripping off the jaw, face contorted, mouth wide open in a shape that could be a laugh or a sob, eyes squeezed into wet crescents, facial muscles trembling visibly. The main character says aloud with visible lip movement: 'I did it, I actually did it.' The delivery is loud and energetic. Photorealistic. Live action footage. Real human face. Natural skin texture. Small enclosed space, only one person visible in the entire frame. Silent room tone. No ambient sound bed. No background voices. Only the main character's vocal sounds. Fixed camera on tripod, locked-off shot. No camera movement. No background music, no BGM, no soundtrack.
dialogue: I did it, I actually did it.

archetype.canonical_meaning: Person maintains neutral professional exterior but body leaks anger.

Fixed camera on tripod, locked-off shot. No camera movement. No background music, no BGM, no soundtrack.
dialogue: I understand, let me help you with that.
